title: ParameterDataType
content:
# ParameterDataType

The data type of the parameter. It can be `string`, `number`, or `boolean`.

## Enum Values

- `string`
- `number`
- `boolean`
summary: The data type of the parameter. It can be `string`, `number`, or `boolean`.
